# Journal: 2026-04-13

## Summary

Code review completed, addressed feedback. Deployed Phase 1 and Phase 2 to staging. Started 48-hour shadow validation.

## Work Done

- Received code review feedback from @kafka-expert: 3 comments.
  - Comment 1: Rename WindowCombiner to HybridWindowCombiner for clarity — done.
  - Comment 2: Add null-check for event key before routing to DLQ — done.
  - Comment 3: Extract BackpressureHandler threshold to a constant — done (BACKPRESSURE_HEAP_THRESHOLD = 0.80).
- Addressed all 3 review comments and pushed updated PR.
- @kafka-expert approved PR after review of changes.
- Merged PR to main branch.
- Deployed Phase 1 to staging: dual topology running, 0% traffic to new topology.
- Verified both topologies consuming from nestads-events-raw without errors.
- Verified old topology output matches expected statistics format (baseline check).
- Deployed Phase 2 to staging: 10% traffic routed to new topology.
- Monitored Phase 2 for 2 hours: consumer lag stable at ~200 messages (well under 10K alarm).
- Started Phase 3 shadow mode validation: automated diff checker running every 5 minutes.
- Diff checker showing 0 discrepancies after first 4 hours of shadow mode.
- Set up Grafana alerts for shadow mode: any diff > 0 triggers PagerDuty.

## Decisions

- Shadow mode validation window: 48 hours minimum (2026-04-13 14:00 UTC to 2026-04-15 14:00 UTC).
- Phase 3 diff checker runs every 5 minutes (cron job on monitoring VM).
- Proceed to Phase 4 only after zero discrepancies for full 48-hour window.

## Blockers

- SRE sign-off for Phase 4 still pending — @sre-lead reviewing Phase 3 results.
- Integration test environment flakiness confirmed: stale offsets in test Kafka cluster.
  - Workaround: reset consumer group offsets in test setup teardown.
  - Permanent fix: add consumer group cleanup to EmbeddedKafka fixture — deferred to cleanup PR.
- DG-0041 (data governance for DLQ retention) still no response after 1 day.
- INF-0892 (Grafana metric namespaces) assigned to infra team, ETA unknown.

## Next

- Monitor shadow mode diff checker for 48 hours (until 2026-04-15 14:00 UTC).
- Follow up with @sre-lead on Phase 4 approval.
- Follow up with data governance on DG-0041.
- Fix integration test flakiness (consumer group cleanup).
- Prepare Phase 4 deployment runbook.

## Notes

- Shadow mode diff checker log: /var/log/nestads/shadow-diff.log on monitoring VM.
- Grafana dashboard for shadow mode: NestAds Statistics Shadow (ID: dash-0043).
